units.source_text: 1 總額包括客⼾及同業貸款賬⾯總值23億美元（分類為持作出售⽤途資產）及相關預期信貸損失準備200萬美元，包括於第329⾴附註23「持作出售⽤途資產、持作
units.translation_target_text: 1 The total includes the total carrying amount of loans to customers and peers of US$2.3 billion (classified as assets held for sale) and related expected credit loss provisions of US$2.0 million, included in Note 23 “Assets held for sale, held for sale” on page 329

units.source_text: 2 這包括客⼾貸款賬⾯總值4億美元及相關預期信貸損失準備100萬美元，乃與出售法國業務保留住宅和其他零售貸款組合有關，詳情於第329⾴附註23披露。
units.translation_target_text: 2 This includes an aggregate carrying value of loans to customers of US$400 million and an associated provision for expected credit losses of US$1 million, related to the sale of the French business' retained residential and other retail loan portfolio, details of which are disclosed in note 23 on page 329.
units.translation_en: 2 This includes an aggregate carrying value of loans to customers of US$400 million and an associated provision for expected credit losses of US$1 million, related to the sale of the French business' retained residential and other retail loan portfolio, details of which are disclosed in note 23 on page 329.
